feature: Docker image for @bolyra/gateway with GHCR publishing and CI workflow

tasks.description: Create Dockerfile.gateway at repo root with multi-stage build installing @bolyra/gateway from npm
Create .dockerignore at repo root to minimize build context
Create GitHub Actions workflow for Docker build and GHCR push
tasks.test_expectation: Valid YAML workflow with correct triggers and steps

tasks.description: Update integrations/gateway/README.md with Docker usage section
tasks.test_expectation: Docker section added with build, run, and healthcheck examples

tasks.description: Build and smoke-test Docker image locally
tasks.test_command: docker build -f Dockerfile.gateway -t bolyra-gateway-test . && docker run --rm -d -p 4100:4100 --name bolyra-gw-test bolyra-gateway-test --target http://host.docker.internal:3000/mcp --dev && sleep 3 && curl -s http://localhost:4100/healthz && docker stop bolyra-gw-test
